title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Co-Scientist is a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system developed by Google DeepMind that iteratively generates, debates, and evolves novel scientific hypotheses for complex problems. The system aims to accelerate the pace of scientific breakthroughs by serving as a research partner for hypothesis generation and refinement.
